'''Marquarra''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a weapons cache of the [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]]. It was allied with the [[Imperial Remnant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
